alternatives_rejected: api_saas (adds API, auth, billing, and background layers not requested)
template_choice.reason: content_saas is the smallest architecture template in the current knowledge base that covers CMS-backed marketing pages, editorial content structures, and webhook-driven revalidation.

assumptions.reason: This site has more than three editor-controlled routes and dynamic service and area pages.
The brief explicitly disables auth, payments, and an application database for this marketing-site run.

deferred: Online booking integration until a provider is named.
Exact suburb list and coverage map until the service area is confirmed.
Brand name, phone, and license details until client data is supplied.
